title: White working-class children failed by education system, says inquiry
abstract: Have you heard the stir caused by an inquiry claiming that white working-class children are being let down by the education system? The debate is heating up as everyone wonders: Is it the challenging books or the lack of teacher empathy? Anyway, there seems to be a consensus that these kids deserve better. Dive into this thought-provoking topic and find out more!
abstract_zh: 你听过没？某项调查说，白人蓝领阶层的孩子被教育系统坑了！这事儿闹得沸反盈天，大家纷纷猜测：到底哪个环节出了岔子？是课本太难还是老师不够耐心？反正就是觉得，咱们的孩子应该有更好些的未来。赶紧来看看这个引人深思的话题吧！
